note: Martyrdom and Lives of SS. Sergius and Bacchus, Basil, Martianus, the forty martyrs of Sebastia, Archelides, Thecla, Pantaleon and Hermolaus and their companions, Theodore and his companions, Abramius, Cosmas and Damian, “God’s Man”, Mary the Maccabaen, John of the Golden Gospel, and Eustace and Ilaczus

work.desc_title: A letter of Caliph Omar to a monk of China
Story of Joseph son of Jacob
